content.full_text:
June 29, 2005

Clyde Vaughn
59 Donna Maria Way
Orinda, CA 94563

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-130

Dear Mr. Vaughn:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice on the use of public funds by the Moraga-Orinda Fire Protection District under the provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹ Your inquiry presents questions regarding the use of public funds which are outside the purview of the Act and should be redirected to the Attorney General’s Office. Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, any request not meeting the requirements for formal written advice or informal assistance, must be declined by this agency.

Further, under California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), copy enclosed, unless you are an authorized representative of district, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. However, if you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you have the option of filing a complaint with our Enforcement Division.

Should you have additional questions regarding this matter, please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosures
JWW:rd

1. Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
